notes: sha256 verified by `memd hooks doctor`. integrations/hooks/ and .claude/hooks/ are install-generated mirrors.

hooks.name: install.sh
hooks.purpose: Installs memd hooks into harness-specific targets (symlinks or copies).

hooks.name: install.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows PowerShell counterpart of install.sh.

hooks.name: memd-bootstrap.sh
hooks.purpose: Runs memd wake on first prompt; enforces caveman voice + memd policy.

hooks.name: memd-capture.sh
hooks.purpose: Captures end-of-turn summary into memd via `memd hook capture`.

hooks.name: memd-capture.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-capture.sh.

hooks.name: memd-context.sh
hooks.purpose: Emits wake packet into session context.

hooks.name: memd-context.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-context.sh.

hooks.name: memd-file-interaction.sh
hooks.purpose: A3 Part 1 ledger: records {file,op,count,ts} into session file_interactions.json.

hooks.name: memd-lifecycle-probe.sh
hooks.purpose: A3-D3 working-memory lifecycle self-test (store -> recall -> expire -> verify).

hooks.name: memd-precompact-save.sh
hooks.purpose: NON-BLOCKING save before compaction; seals file-interaction ledger snapshot.

hooks.name: memd-precompact-save.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-precompact-save.sh.

hooks.name: memd-postcompact-restore.sh
hooks.purpose: A4 Part 1: restore sealed file-interaction ledger after compaction before tools fire.

hooks.name: memd-postcompact-restore.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-postcompact-restore.sh.

hooks.name: memd-postcompact-restore.sh
hooks.purpose: A4 Part 1: cross-harness PostCompact restore — same script, codex harness binding.

hooks.name: memd-preedit-prime.sh
hooks.purpose: A3 Part 1 continuation-session primer: auto-reads files from prior session ledger before first Edit/Write.

hooks.name: memd-pretool-gate.sh
hooks.purpose: A3 Part 3 write-path gate: blocks writes outside canonical layout when continuity.enforcement=block.

hooks.name: memd-spill.sh
hooks.purpose: Spills transcript into memd short-term lane before compaction.

hooks.name: memd-spill.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-spill.sh.

hooks.name: memd-stop-save.sh
hooks.purpose: End-of-turn checkpoint save; commits dirty tracked files when configured.

hooks.name: memd-turn-tick.sh
hooks.purpose: F4.7 per-turn drift driver: calls `memd preference tick` each turn so cadence rollovers append `tick_fire` rows to .memd/logs/preference-drift.ndjson. Gated on MEMD_F4_PREF_DRIFT.

hooks.name: memd-stop-save.ps1
hooks.purpose: Windows counterpart of memd-stop-save.sh.
